mapping_description: This mapping loads the data from source MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS to Flat File FF_MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ADJUSTMENT_REASON,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ADJUSTMENT_REASON,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CODE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ADJUSTMENT_REASON_CODE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.AMOUNT,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.AP_VALIDATION_ERROR, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))AP_VALIDATION_ERROR,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTENDEES,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTENDEES,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE1,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE1,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE10, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE10,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE11, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE11,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE12, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE12,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE13, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE13,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE14, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE14,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE15, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE15,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE2,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE2,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE3,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE3,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE4,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE4,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE5,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE5,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE6,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE6,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE7,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE7,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE8,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE8,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE9,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE9,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.AVG_MILEAGE_RATE, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.AWARD_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.AWARD_NUMBER,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))AWARD_NUMBER,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.AWT_GROUP_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.CATEGORY_CODE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))CATEGORY_CODE,
NVL(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,-999),
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.COMPANY_PREPAID_INVOICE_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.COUNTRY_OF_SUPPLY, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))COUNTRY_OF_SUPPLY,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.CREATED_BY,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.CREATION_DATE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.CREDIT_CARD_TRX_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.CURRENCY_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)),
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.DAILY_AMOUNT, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.DAILY_DISTANCE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT1,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT2,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.DEDUCTION_ADDITION_AMT3,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.DESTINATION_FROM,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))DESTINATION_FROM,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.DESTINATION_TO,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))DESTINATION_TO,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.DISTANCE_UNIT_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))DISTANCE_UNIT_CODE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.DISTRIBUTION_LINE_NUMBER,
case when END_EXPENSE_DATE between To_date('01/01/1900 00:00:00','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')  and To_date('01/01/3500 00:00:00','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') then END_EXPENSE_DATE
     else To_date('01/01/3500 00:00:00','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')end  as  END_EXPENSE_DATE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.EXCHANGE_DATE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.EXCHANGE_RATE,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.EXPENDITURE_TYPE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))EXPENDITURE_TYPE,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.EXPENSE_GROUP, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))EXPENSE_GROUP,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.FLEX_CONCATENATED, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))FLEX_CONCATENATED,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.FLIGHT_NUMBER,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))FLIGHT_NUMBER,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.FUEL_TYPE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))FUEL_TYPE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.FUNC_CURRENCY_AMT,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_NAME,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))GLOBAL_NAME,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ITEMIZE_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ITEM_DESCRIPTION,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) ITEM_DESCRIPTION,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.JUSTIFICATION,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) JUSTIFICATION,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.JUSTIFICATION_REQUIRED_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) JUSTIFICATION_REQUIRED_FLAG,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32)) LICENSE_PLATE_NUMBER,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))LINE_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.LOCATION,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))LOCATION,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.LOCATION_ID, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.LOCATION_TO_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.MERCHANT_DOCUMENT_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))MERCHANT_DOCUMENT_NUMBER,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.MERCHANT_NAME, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))MERCHANT_NAME,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.MERCHANT_REFERENCE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))MERCHANT_REFERENCE,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.MERCHANT_TAXPAYER_ID, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))MERCHANT_TAXPAYER_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.MERCHANT_TAX_REG_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))MERCHANT_TAX_REG_NUMBER,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.MILEAGE_RATE_ADJUSTED_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))MILEAGE_RATE_ADJUSTED_FLAG,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUMBER_ATTENDEES,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUMBER_PEOPLE, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS1, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS2,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_ACCOMMODATIONS3,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS1,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS2,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_BREAKFASTS3,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_DINNERS1,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_DINNERS2,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_DINNERS3, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES1,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES2,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_FREE_LUNCHES3,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_PDM_DAYS1,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_PDM_DAYS2,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.NUM_PDM_DAYS3,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ORG_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.PA_INTERFACED_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))PA_INTERFACED_FLAG,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.PA_QUANTITY,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.PER_DIEM_RATE1, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.PER_DIEM_RATE2, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.PER_DIEM_RATE3, 
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))POLICY_SHORTPAY_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.PROJECT_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.PROJECT_NAME, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))PROJECT_NAME,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.PROJECT_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))PROJECT_NUMBER,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.RECEIPT_CONVERSION_RATE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_AMOUNT,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))RECEIPT_CURRENCY_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.RECEIPT_MISSING_FLAG, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))RECEIPT_MISSING_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))RECEIPT_REQUIRED_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))RECEIPT_VERIFIED_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.REFERENCE_1,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))REFERENCE_1,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.REFERENCE_2,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))REFERENCE_2,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.REPORT_HEADER_ID, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.REPORT_LINE_ID, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
case when START_EXPENSE_DATE between To_date('01/01/1900 00:00:00','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')  and To_date('01/01/3500 00:00:00','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') then START_EXPENSE_DATE
     else To_date('01/01/1900 00:00:00','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')end  as  START_EXPENSE_DATE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.STAT_AMOUNT,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.SUBMITTED_AMOUNT, 
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.TASK_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.TASK_NAME,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TASK_NAME,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.TASK_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TASK_NUMBER,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.TAX_CODE_ID,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TAX_CODE_OVERRIDE_FLAG,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.TICKET_CLASS_CODE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TICKET_CLASS_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.TICKET_NUMBER, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TICKET_NUMBER,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.TRAVEL_TYPE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))TRAVEL_TYPE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.TRIP_DISTANCE,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.VAT_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))VAT_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.VEHICLE_CATEGORY_CODE, chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))VEHICLE_CATEGORY_CODE,
REPLACE(replace(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.VEHICLE_TYPE,chr(10),chr(32)),CHR(13),CHR(32))VEHICLE_TYPE,
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.WEB_PARAMETER_ID
FROM
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS  MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS,MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_HDRS Exp_HDRS
WHERE 
Exp_HDRS.REPORT_HEADER_ID=MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.REPORT_HEADER_ID AND
Exp_HDRS.GLOBAL_NAME=MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GLOBAL_NAME  AND 
Exp_HDRS.SOURCE  IN ('NonValidatedWebExpense','WebExpense','SelfService','CREDIT CARD','Both Pay')
AND 
(Exp_HDRS.GLOBAL_NAME='BE' or  (Exp_HDRS.GLOBAL_NAME='US' and Exp_HDRS.ORG_ID =161)) AND
/* NVL(MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.ITEMIZATION_PARENT_ID,0) <> -1 AND */
MF_AP_EXP_REPORT_LINS.GES_UPDATE_DATE >To_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
and report_line_id  not in ( 449854734,449854735,451715073,451715074,454918826,454918827,468032209,468032211,462418227, 462418228)
